title: Challenges and trends in automotive battery recycling
authors: Niklas Kronemeyer
Hannah Mittag
Chris Gabrisch
Jens Leker
Simon Lux
Richard Schmuch
Fabian Duffner
abstract: Published online: 17 July 2026; doi:10.1038/s41560-026-02092-9 The rapid growth of electric vehicles is creating a surge of end-of-life batteries. This Review evaluates current recycling methods, their suitability for emerging chemistries and the practical challenges for scaling a circular battery industry.
